case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. VS. SARA ESPINO ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-03-2018 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT ESPINO, SARA DOES 1 THROUGH 5, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-14-2018
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO C.C.P. 395(B): VENUE FOR PERSONAL, FAMILY OR HOUSEHOLD OBLIGATIONS (TRANSACTION ID # 100030595) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFFS ATTORNEY REGARDING NONMILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 100030595) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100034611), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. SERVED NOV-24-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ESPINO, SARA
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF FIRM NAME (TRANSACTION ID # 100037138) FILED BY ATTORNEY BLEIER, ELIZABETH A
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100037138)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-03-2018 CONTINUED TO DEC-04-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-04-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
